name: BeReal
description: Specs and technical requirements for BeReal's authentic dual-camera format.

items.name: BeReal Photo (Front + Back)
items.notes: Both cameras capture simultaneously; front camera (selfie) overlays the back camera photo in the corner

items.name: Front Camera Overlay
items.notes: Selfie thumbnail positioned in top-left corner of the back camera image

items.name: Profile Photo
items.notes: Taken directly in-app using the BeReal camera

items.name: BeReal Video (BTS)
items.notes: Behind-the-scenes mode; dual-camera video captured simultaneously

items.name: Caption
items.notes: Added to a BeReal post after capture

items.name: Username
items.notes: Unique handle; lowercase letters, numbers, underscores

items.name: Profile Photo
items.notes: Captured in-app; displayed as a circle

items.name: RealAd (Image)
items.notes: Native full-screen ads appear in the discovery feed between organic BeReals; must look authentic

items.name: RealAd (Video)
items.notes: Short-form video ads in the discovery feed; autoplay, no sound by default
